description: Machine-readable RFC-0083 endpoint consolidation watchlist. It prevents monitored convenience-route families from growing without explicit ownership, product identity, or approved bounded-use rationale.

monitoredRoutes.reason: Reporting query routes can drift into report-composition APIs instead of source-data contracts.
Cashflow projections must remain core-derived source data, not performance forecasting.
Projected summary must remain deterministic projected state, not advisory or manage recommendation logic.
Advisory-facing simulation routes must not become advisory decisioning owned by core.
Instrument enrichment must remain source reference data, not suitability enrichment.
Benchmark routes must stay aligned with benchmark/reference source-data products.
Index routes must stay aligned with benchmark/reference source-data products.
Risk-free-series routes must stay aligned with reference source-data products.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Current operational readers still need a compact portfolio source summary while migration to named source-data products completes.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Do not add narrative reporting, performance attribution, recommendation, or downstream report composition behavior.
activeWatchlistRoutes.consumerGuidance: Prefer source-data products such as PortfolioStateSnapshot:v1 when consumers need durable provenance, policy, and supportability metadata.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Current operational readers still need a compact allocation source summary while migration to named source-data products completes.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Keep this as core-held allocation source truth only; do not add advice, risk interpretation, or product-specific presentation rules.
activeWatchlistRoutes.consumerGuidance: Prefer HoldingsAsOf or PortfolioStateSnapshot source-data products where consumers need durable product identity and provenance.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Current operational readers still need a compact portfolio summary while migration to named source-data products completes.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Keep this as a source summary; no analytics narrative, report-composition, or recommendation behavior belongs here.
activeWatchlistRoutes.consumerGuidance: Prefer PortfolioStateSnapshot:v1 for durable source-data product consumption.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Core owns deterministic cashflow state derived from booked transactions and cashflow rules.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Do not add performance forecasting, recommendation, or financial-planning advice.
activeWatchlistRoutes.consumerGuidance: Consume this route as PortfolioCashflowProjection:v1 when cashflow source facts are needed.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Core owns deterministic projected state assembled from accepted simulation changes.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Do not add advisory recommendation, suitability, or manage workflow decisioning.
activeWatchlistRoutes.consumerGuidance: Use this only for deterministic projected-state inspection; consume named source-data products for durable portfolio facts.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Core may simulate source-owned proposal execution effects without owning advisory suitability or recommendation logic.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Suitability, recommendation, and proposal decisioning remain outside lotus-core.
activeWatchlistRoutes.consumerGuidance: Use this route only for execution-effect projection; use lotus-advise for advisory recommendation semantics.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Core owns instrument master and reference enrichment facts.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Do not add suitability, eligibility, or advisory-specific enrichment behavior.
activeWatchlistRoutes.consumerGuidance: Consume this route as InstrumentReferenceBundle:v1 for instrument reference facts.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Benchmark catalog lookup is a bounded reference surface while benchmark definition product identity is completed.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Do not add consumer-specific benchmark ranking, reporting narrative, or performance interpretation.
activeWatchlistRoutes.consumerGuidance: Prefer named benchmark/reference source-data products for durable downstream analytics contracts.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Core owns benchmark constituent source windows.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Do not add performance attribution, benchmark recommendation, or reporting narrative.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Core owns bounded coverage evidence for benchmark source readiness.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Expose coverage evidence only; do not add consumer-specific readiness policy decisions.
activeWatchlistRoutes.consumerGuidance: Consume this route as DataQualityCoverageReport:v1 for benchmark coverage diagnostics.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Benchmark definition lookup is a bounded reference surface while product identity is completed.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Do not add consumer-specific benchmark selection, performance interpretation, or reporting narrative.
activeWatchlistRoutes.consumerGuidance: Prefer named benchmark/reference source-data products where durable product identity is required.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Core owns benchmark market-data source windows.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Do not add performance attribution, benchmark recommendation, or reporting narrative.
activeWatchlistRoutes.consumerGuidance: Consume this route as MarketDataWindow:v1 for benchmark market series facts.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Benchmark return series remains bounded reference input while product identity is completed.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Do not add downstream-specific performance analytics, attribution, or narrative.
activeWatchlistRoutes.consumerGuidance: Prefer named benchmark/reference source-data products where durable product identity is required.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Index catalog lookup is a bounded reference surface while complete catalog product identity is completed.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Do not add consumer-specific index ranking, performance interpretation, or reporting narrative.
activeWatchlistRoutes.consumerGuidance: Prefer named index/reference source-data products for durable downstream analytics contracts.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Core owns index price source windows.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Do not add downstream-specific performance analytics or reporting narrative.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Core owns index return source windows.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Do not add downstream-specific performance analytics or reporting narrative.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Core owns risk-free reference source windows.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Do not add downstream-specific performance analytics, discounting policy decisions, or reporting narrative.

activeWatchlistRoutes.approvedRationale: Core owns bounded coverage evidence for risk-free source readiness.
activeWatchlistRoutes.boundaryGuardrail: Expose coverage evidence only; do not add consumer-specific readiness policy decisions.
activeWatchlistRoutes.consumerGuidance: Consume this route as DataQualityCoverageReport:v1 for risk-free coverage diagnostics.

retiredRoutes.removalEvidence: Removed from the active route surface; downstream consumers should derive income summaries from the transaction ledger product.
Removed from the active route surface; downstream consumers should derive activity summaries from the transaction ledger product.
